features: ENJOY 10 LOADS OF FRESH FRAGRANCE - Each canister of scent booster contains enough INCREDiBALLS for 10 laundry cycles. Each little pearl contains a dose of fragrance released during the washing cycle to turn your home fabrics into air fresheners.
description: Product Description POWERKICK CAFFEINE TABLETS 09/25 Ingredients Scent Booster Directions Add an INCREDiBall to the laundry during the wash cycle for 10 cycles. See more
